steps.title: Identify the indirect question
steps.content: The phrase asked... what signals an indirect question—a question being reported within the sentence rather than asked directly.

steps.title: Apply the word-order and punctuation rule
steps.content: Indirect questions use normal word order (subject before verb) and don't take question marks when embedded in a larger sentence. Choice C uses her favorite book was (normal order) with a period. Choices A and D invert the word order, and B uses a question mark instead of a period. That matches choice C — C is correct.
